title: atalantia armata
intro: Atalantia armata, also known as the armate atalantia, is a type of tropical evergreen shrub native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Atalantia armata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can help alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. Atalantia armata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote health and well-being.
